title: Command & Conquer: Red Alert Gameplay Map

narrative.description: Command & Conquer: Red Alert (1996) is a acclaimed rts title recognized in retro gaming lists for its distinctive mechanics, pacing, and lasting influence on the genre.
narrative.core_loop: Harvest resources, build bases, and command armies to destroy the enemy.

mechanics.map_notes: Core resource gathering base build loop defines Command & Conquer: Red Alert's identity.
mechanics.expression: Harvest resources from the map to construct bases and produce military units.

mechanics.map_notes: Core real time unit command loop defines Command & Conquer: Red Alert's identity.
mechanics.expression: Players select and direct multiple units simultaneously during live combat.

mechanics.map_notes: Core tech tree unlocks loop defines Command & Conquer: Red Alert's identity.
mechanics.expression: Research or building prerequisites gate access to advanced units and abilities.

mechanics.map_notes: Mission Select Structure supports the main loop in Command & Conquer: Red Alert.
mechanics.expression: A menu or hub lets the player choose missions or levels in flexible order with difficulty ratings.

mechanics.map_notes: Optional Content Layering supports the main loop in Command & Conquer: Red Alert.
mechanics.expression: Hidden rooms, passages, or content zones exist off main paths, requiring players to investigate suspicious environments.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss Gated Progression supports the main loop in Command & Conquer: Red Alert.
mechanics.expression: A progression structure in which access to subsequent content areas, abilities, or game states is conditionally locked behind the defeat of a designated boss.

mechanics.map_notes: Map Resource Monster Groups supports the main loop in Command & Conquer: Red Alert.
mechanics.expression: Neutral hostile groups occupy fixed map locations, offering experience points and item rewards when defeated, enabling optional power scaling.

mechanics.map_notes: Depletable Health Pool supports the main loop in Command & Conquer: Red Alert.
mechanics.expression: A survival mechanic where the player character possesses a finite quantity of health points that decrease when taking damage, with depletion resulting in failure.

mechanics.map_notes: Telegraphed Threat Loop supports the main loop in Command & Conquer: Red Alert.
mechanics.expression: A combat encounter structure in which an enemy signals an incoming attack through a distinct visual or audio cue before the attack resolves.

mechanics.map_notes: Multi Phase Boss Battle supports the main loop in Command & Conquer: Red Alert.
mechanics.expression: A combat structure where boss encounters transition through discrete stages with distinct attack patterns, behaviors, or environmental conditions when health thresholds are reached.

mechanics.map_notes: Progress Gated Dungeon Completion supports the main loop in Command & Conquer: Red Alert.
mechanics.expression: The player must fully complete self-contained dungeons, each with unique challenges, in order to unlock new areas or abilities.

mechanics.map_notes: Purchase Gated Upgrade supports the main loop in Command & Conquer: Red Alert.
mechanics.expression: Players collect currency through gameplay and exchange it at vendors for permanent upgrades, creating economic progression choices.

mechanics.map_notes: Environmental Hazard Navigation supports the main loop in Command & Conquer: Red Alert.
mechanics.expression: A traversal mechanic in which the level space contains persistent damaging or lethal obstacles that the player must avoid through precise movement.

mechanics.map_notes: Linear Stage Gauntlet supports the main loop in Command & Conquer: Red Alert.
mechanics.expression: Progression moves through a fixed sequence of confined stages without hub backtracking.

mechanics.map_notes: Equipment Loadout supports the main loop in Command & Conquer: Red Alert.
mechanics.expression: Weapons, armor, and accessories occupy distinct equipment slots and modify combat stats and abilities.

design_intent.player_fantasy: A rts experience centered on Command & Conquer: Red Alert.
